overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark concrete underpass with cyan neon lights, emerging into a sunlit abandoned urban plaza with overgrown vegetation, and approaching a massive statue surrounded by derelict skyscrapers and construction cranes.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark concrete underpass toward the light at the far end

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete ceiling and support pillars creating a covered walkway
cyan-colored neon tubes mounted along the right wall illuminating the dark passage
large monumental statue of a figure with raised arms visible through openings in the structure
metal fencing running along the left side separating the walkway from the exterior

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dark, covered concrete underpass illuminated by cyan neon strips on the right wall. Through openings on the left, a massive statue is visible in the distance against a bright blue sky, while the path ahead leads toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street with overgrown vegetation

events.description: exits the covered underpass into bright open sunlight
lighting shifts from dark neon-lit tunnel to bright natural midday sun causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the abandoned street with rusted vehicles and overgrown plants on either side

entered.detail: circular stadium-like structure with curved roof covered in rust and vegetation
derelict heavy vehicle with orange rust covering the cab and flatbed
tall palm trees with dry fronds growing through cracks in the pavement

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into harsh sunlight, the scene opens onto an abandoned street with a large circular stadium structure on the right and rusted vehicles scattered about. Overgrown vegetation and palm trees line the path as the camera moves toward the distant statue now centered in the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with monumental statue and concrete stairs

events.description: turns left toward the large statue and begins ascending the concrete stairs
explosion or spark effect occurs on the ground near the statue base with smoke rising

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive statue and climbing the wide concrete stairs toward its base

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete steps leading up to the statue platform with graffiti on the risers
tall yellow cranes visible against the sky behind the statue indicating unfinished construction
dark smoke rising from fires in the distant abandoned buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the massive statue and ascends the graffiti-covered concrete stairs. The statue dominates the frame—a weathered figure with raised arms holding an object—while construction cranes and smoke plumes rise in the background. A sudden spark explosion occurs near the base as the player approaches the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, neon-lit concrete corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban ruin. It begins within a dark underpass illuminated by cyan neon strips, where glimpses of a distant monument are visible through openings in the left wall. As the camera emerges from the tunnel into harsh sunlight, the environment opens into an abandoned street filled with rusted vehicles, palm trees, and a large circular stadium. The scene then shifts focus toward the massive statue as the camera ascends graffiti-covered concrete stairs, bringing the weathered figure and background construction cranes into full view. Finally, the movement culminates at the base of the monument, where a sudden spark explosion erupts just as the platform is reached.
